theme_and_archetype.description: A visually appealing, approachable, and playful design tailored for a school environment. Emphasizes the 'liquid glass' aesthetic (refined glassmorphism) with soft pastel colors, translucent surfaces, and minimalistic icons to keep the interface engaging but not overwhelming.

surface_strategies.details: Use backdrop-blur-xl or backdrop-blur-2xl. Background should be bg-white/50 to bg-white/70. Add an inner 1px border of border-white/60 to simulate light catching the edge of the glass. Soft shadow-xl or shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.08)] for elevation. Important: Add backdrop-saturate-150 to make the background colors pop through the glass.

spacing_and_layout.general: Generous spacing. Use p-6, p-8, p-12 for containers. Let the liquid glass elements breathe.
spacing_and_layout.grid_system: Bento Grid Mode A for Landing Page Categories. Mode B for Admin Dashboard.
spacing_and_layout.alignment: Left-align dense text and questions for readability. Center align hero elements and final score pages.

components.cards: Liquid glass cards with hover lift (-translate-y-1) and increased shadow. border-white/50.
components.buttons: Pill-shaped (rounded-full) or heavily rounded (rounded-2xl). Primary buttons use a soft pastel gradient or solid pastel with a subtle white inner border and drop shadow. Hover states must increase brightness and slightly lift. Text must maintain a 4.5:1 contrast ratio.
components.inputs: Shadcn UI customized. Soft backgrounds (bg-white/40), rounded-xl, focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/50.
components.timer: Circular progress or soft pill-shaped floating element at the top. Use accent colors that shift to red/orange as time runs out.
components.leaderboard: List items as distinct glass strips with generous padding. Highlight the current user with a primary-tinted glass strip.

animations_and_interactions.scroll: Smooth scroll with staggered entrance animations for quiz options and leaderboards.
animations_and_interactions.hover: All interactive elements must scale slightly (scale-105) or shift colors on hover.
animations_and_interactions.feedback: Use Sonner for toasts (glass styled). Micro-interactions on clicking answers (e.g., a quick pulse or border glow).

icons_and_assets.style: Minimalistic, stroke width 2, matching text color or primary color.

images.description: Abstract 3D liquid glass spheres, soft pastel baby blue and lavender, frosted glass effect. Use as a full-screen background or hero section background image with object-cover.
Abstract 3D liquid glass shapes, pastel peach and warm yellow. Use as background for specific category cards (e.g., History/Arts).
Abstract 3D liquid glass shapes, pastel mint green. Use as background for specific category cards (e.g., Science/Math).
Beautiful abstract liquid glass waves, gradient of baby blue and pink. Perfect for the login/register page background.
Group of children sitting on ground. Good for an 'About', 'Welcome', or generic marketing section.

specific_pages_guidance.landing_page: Use the 'hero_background' as a fixed background. Floating glass header. Big playful heading in Croatian. Main CTA: 'Započni Kviz' (Start Quiz).
specific_pages_guidance.quiz_interface: Ensure no background noise behind the text. Use a very subtle pastel gradient or flat color (e.g., #F5F8FA) so questions are highly readable. The question container is the primary liquid glass card. Answer options are smaller glass strips.
specific_pages_guidance.admin_dashboard: Bento Grid layout (Mode B). Keep it clean with slight borders instead of full glass to maintain performance and data clarity. Subtle pastels for chart/stat elements. Features: Question Management Panel.
specific_pages_guidance.leaderboard: Gamified feel. Highlight top 3 with special borders (gold/silver/bronze tinted borders) and use minimalistic avatar icons. Croatian header: 'Poredak' or 'Najbolji Rezultati'.
specific_pages_guidance.login_auth: Optional user login page uses 'auth_background' image with a central liquid glass card for the form. Implement simple anti-spam system (e.g., hidden honeypot or simple math question).

testing_attributes: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid. E.g., data-testid='start-quiz-button', data-testid='answer-option', data-testid='login-submit-button'.
language: Croatian (hr). Use Croatian terms for all user-facing copy (e.g., Prijava za Login, Pitanja za Questions).
